title: GST Voucher (GSTV) – MediSave
text:
GST Voucher (GSTV) – MediSave - SupportGoWhere
GST Voucher (GSTV) – MediSave
Share link
MediSave top-up of up to $450 for Singapore Citizens aged 65 and above, residing in Singapore.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Eligible Singapore citizens can receive up to $450 in their MediSave accounts
Top-ups will be credited in August each year
Collapse all sections
About this support

Top-up of up to $450 to MediSave accounts of Singapore Citizens aged 65 and above

To be credited in August each year

Who is this for?

For GSTV – MediSave Payout in 2026

Singapore Citizen residing in Singapore;

Aged 65 and above in 2026;

Annual Value of home (as indicated on NRIC) not exceeding $31,000 as at 31 December 2025; and

Does not own more than 1 property.

How to apply?

No application needed if you have previously signed-up for past GSTV payouts

If you have never signed-up for past GSTV payouts, you can apply by logging in to the e-services on the govbenefits portal

Where can I find help?

View more details

1800 222 2888

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Contact us

Scheme last updated 15 Apr 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
